Buffs.buffList: Attrition, Charge Infusion, Clarity, Combat Frenzy, Freezing Explosion, Herald of Thunder, Ice Bite, Innervate, Rage, Shattering Palm, Wind Dancer

Items.Item: Rarity: RARE Empyrean Hand Opulent Gloves Energy Shield: 106 Item Level: 82 Quality: 20 Sockets: S Rune: Lesser Desert Rune LevelReq: 70 Implicits: 1 {enchant}{rune}+14% to Fire Resistance Requires: Level 70, 113 Int 92% increased Energy Shield Adds 2 to 53 Lightning damage to Attacks +143 to maximum Life +2 to Level of all Melee Skills +45% to Cold Resistance +26% to Lightning Resistance

Rarity: RARE Havoc Track Sandsworn Sandals Energy Shield: 201 Item Level: 82 Quality: 20 Sockets: S Rune: Iron Rune LevelReq: 75 Implicits: 1 {enchant}{rune}25% increased Armour, Evasion and Energy Shield Requires: Level 75, 131 Int 22% increased Energy Shield +40 to Stun Threshold 35% increased Movement Speed +39 to maximum Energy Shield 13% increased Rarity of Items found +28 to Intelligence +28% to Lightning Resistance

Rarity: RARE Corpse Star Sorcerous Tiara Energy Shield: 400 Item Level: 80 Quality: 20 Sockets: S S Rune: Iron Rune Rune: Iron Rune LevelReq: 70 Implicits: 1 {enchant}{rune}50% increased Armour, Evasion and Energy Shield Requires: Level 70, 129 Int +28 to maximum Energy Shield 128% increased Energy Shield +47 to maximum Life 19% increased Rarity of Items found 30% increased Critical Hit Chance +30 to Intelligence Corrupted

Rarity: RARE Hypnotic Pelt Sleek Jacket Evasion: 1376 Energy Shield: 524 Item Level: 80 Quality: 20 Sockets: S S S Rune: Iron Rune Rune: Iron Rune Rune: Iron Rune LevelReq: 65 Implicits: 1 {enchant}{rune}75% increased Armour, Evasion and Energy Shield Requires: Level 65, 68 Dex, 68 Int +118 to Evasion Rating +46 to maximum Energy Shield 122% increased Evasion and Energy Shield +24 to maximum Life 20% reduced Attribute Requirements +40% to Cold Resistance 43% reduced Ignite Duration on you Corrupted

Rarity: UNIQUE Ingenuity Utility Belt Charm Slots: 3 Item Level: 84 LevelReq: 55 Implicits: 2 Has 3 Charm Slots 20% of Flask Recovery applied Instantly Requires: Level 55 1% increased Charm Charges gained 8% reduced Charm Charges used 36% increased bonuses gained from left Equipped Ring 36% increased bonuses gained from right Equipped Ring Corrupted

Rarity: RARE Sol Grip Ruby Ring Item Level: 80 LevelReq: 8 Implicits: 1 +21% to Fire Resistance Quality (Attack Modifiers): +20% Requires: Level 59 Adds 25 to 37 Fire damage to Attacks Adds 28 to 33 Cold damage to Attacks Adds 6 to 70 Lightning damage to Attacks +32 to Intelligence +22% to Fire Resistance +25 to Strength

Rarity: RARE Demon Coil Prismatic Ring Item Level: 81 LevelReq: 35 Implicits: 1 +8% to all Elemental Resistances Quality (Fire Modifiers): +20% Requires: Level 56 Adds 27 to 32 Fire damage to Attacks 26% increased Cold Damage 20% increased Rarity of Items found +45% to Fire Resistance +20% to Cold Resistance +39% to Lightning Resistance

Rarity: RARE Sol Rosary Lunar Amulet Item Level: 79 LevelReq: 14 Implicits: 2 {enchant}Allocates Stormcharged +28 to maximum Energy Shield Quality (Defence Modifiers): +20% Requires: Level 60 +3 to Level of all Melee Skills +91 to maximum Energy Shield 24% increased maximum Energy Shield +126 to maximum Life +22 to all Attributes +16% to all Elemental Resistances Corrupted

Rarity: RARE Plague Heart Sapphire Item Level: 79 Implicits: 0 11% increased maximum Energy Shield Damage Penetrates 7% Cold Resistance Gain additional Ailment Threshold equal to 13% of maximum Energy Shield Gain additional Stun Threshold equal to 15% of maximum Energy Shield

Rarity: RARE Hypnotic Shine Sapphire Item Level: 80 Implicits: 0 13% increased Cold Damage 18% increased maximum Energy Shield 14% increased Critical Damage Bonus Gain additional Stun Threshold equal to 11% of maximum Energy Shield Corrupted

Rarity: RARE Soul Hope Sapphire Item Level: 77 Implicits: 0 18% increased maximum Energy Shield 13% increased Elemental Damage Gain additional Ailment Threshold equal to 13% of maximum Energy Shield Gain additional Stun Threshold equal to 12% of maximum Energy Shield

Rarity: MAGIC Dawnlit Thawing Charm of the Surgeon Item Level: 60 Quality: 0 LevelReq: 12 Implicits: 1 Used when you become Frozen Lasts 3 Seconds Consumes 40 of 40 Charges on use Currently has 40 Charges Grants Immunity to Freeze Requires: Level 36 Gain 38 Guard during Effect 32% Chance to gain a Charge when you Kill an Enemy

Rarity: MAGIC Petaled Stone Charm of the Sylvan Item Level: 79 Quality: 0 LevelReq: 8 Implicits: 1 Used when you become Stunned Lasts 3 Seconds Consumes 20 of 40 Charges on use Currently has 40 Charges Requires: Level 37 Recover 148 Life when Used Gains 0.25 Charges per Second

Rarity: MAGIC Examiner's Silver Charm of the Practitioner Item Level: 49 Quality: 0 LevelReq: 10 Implicits: 1 Used when you are affected by a Slow Lasts 3,80 Seconds Consumes 16 of 40 Charges on use Currently has 40 Charges Requires: Level 33 28% increased Duration 18% reduced Charges per use

Rarity: MAGIC Potent Ultimate Life Flask of the Distiller Item Level: 70 Quality: 20 LevelReq: 60 Implicits: 0 Recovers 1888 Life over 3 Seconds Consumes 7 of 75 Charges on use Currently has 75 Charges Requires: Level 60 71% increased Amount Recovered 25% reduced Charges per use

Rarity: MAGIC Abundant Ultimate Mana Flask of the Sylvan Item Level: 83 Quality: 20 LevelReq: 60 Implicits: 0 Recovers 591 Mana over 3 Seconds Consumes 10 of 75 Charges on use Currently has 75 Charges Requires: Level 60 59% increased Amount Recovered Gains 0.25 Charges per Second

Rarity: RARE Rune Song Sinister Quarterstaff Item Level: 83 Quality: 20 Sockets: S S Rune: Soul Core of Ticaba Rune: Soul Core of Ticaba LevelReq: 67 Implicits: 2 {enchant}{rune}+24% to Critical Damage Bonus {enchant}+14% to Critical Damage Bonus Fire Damage: 53-74 Critical Hit Chance: 11.50% Attacks per Second: 1.40 Requires: Level 67, 135 Dex, 53 Int Adds 19 to 36 Physical Damage Adds 53 to 74 Fire Damage 130% increased Elemental Damage with Attacks +7 to Level of all Melee Skills +39% to Critical Damage Bonus Gain 43 Mana per Enemy Killed Corrupted

Rarity: MAGIC Saturated Ultimate Mana Flask of the Chemist Crafted: true Prefix: {range:1}FlaskIncreasedRecoveryAmount8 Suffix: {range:1}FlaskChargesUsed6 Quality: 20 LevelReq: 66 Implicits: 0 80% increased Amount Recovered 32% reduced Charges per use

Input.name: customMods
Input.string:
15% more critical damage bonus 15% more Critical Hit Chance #blindside support
26% less attack speed #compensation to have the real damage per crystal explosion
+1 to level of all skills #amulet corruption
